scripts.build: uv sync --directory apps/back && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.lint:back: uv run --directory apps/back ruff check . && uv run --directory apps/back ruff format --check .
scripts.check:back: pnpm lint:back && pnpm type:back && pnpm test:back
scripts.check:web: pnpm lint:web && pnpm type:web && pnpm test:web
